final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [9:0] count
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 10'd0;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
